items.title: apple/container
items.original_summary: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon. | 语言: Swift | Stars: 38,212 | Forks: 1,101 | 10,896 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Apple 开源 container，在 Mac 上用 Swift 写的轻量虚拟机跑 Linux 容器，为 Apple Silicon 优化。和 OrbStack / Docker Desktop 同赛道，但官方出品值得关注。
items.backend_focus: Mac 开发机或 CI runner 可替换 Docker Desktop,减少虚拟化开销。需确认是否支持现有 Dockerfile 和 docker-compose 语法,再评估迁移。

items.title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
items.original_summary: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks. | 语言: Python | Stars: 7,461 | Forks: 554 | 5,190 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: NVIDIA 发布 SkillSpector,扫描 AI Agent skill 文件中的安全漏洞和恶意模式。Agent 生态爆火后供应链攻击面变大,这类工具是刚需。
items.backend_focus: 若你公司在内部 Agent 平台接受第三方 skill,需在 CI/CD 加入 SkillSpector 扫描步骤;skill 仓库 PR 流程增加安全门禁。

items.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.original_summary: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. | 语言: Shell | Stars: 62,253 | Forks: 6,751 | 11,431 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Google 工程师 addyosmani 维护的 agent-skills 合集,生产级 AI 编程 Agent 工程实践。本周涨 1.1 万星,主要是 Cursor/Copilot 用户在收藏。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质。内容是 skill 配置文件合集,没有 SDK 也没有 API。不影响后端架构,可作参考资料浏览。

items.title: phuryn/pm-skills
items.original_summary: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth. | 语言: N/A | Stars: 19,336 | Forks: 1,977 | 5,775 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: PM Skills Marketplace,100+ Agent skill 模板合集。从需求发现到上线增长全流程。增长靠 AI 营销包装,本质是 skill 仓库。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质。和 index 3 同类,纯内容合集,无后端接入点。PM 可看,后端无需关注。

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.original_summary: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world | 语言: TypeScript | Stars: 125,008 | Forks: 6,792 | 6,246 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: iptv-org 老牌项目,聚合全球公开 IPTV 频道源。12 万星老项目,本周新增 6000 星,主要因直播需求回暖。
items.backend_focus: 若做直播聚合或 IPTV 中间件,可拉取 m3u 列表作上游数据源。注意合规风险,公开源稳定性差,生产用需做健康检查和自动切换。

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.original_summary: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. | 语言: Python | Stars: 33,128 | Forks: 2,668 | 6,427 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Agent-Reach 给 AI Agent 一个 CLI 就能读写 Twitter/Reddit/YouTube/GitHub/B站/小红书,号称零 API 费用。本质是爬虫封装,合规风险高。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质。'零 API 费'等于'全靠爬虫',Twitter/小红书反爬严格,生产环境用会触发风控。仅适合个人 demo,不可进生产链路。

items.title: chopratejas/headroom
items.original_summary: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. | 语言: Python | Stars: 31,541 | Forks: 2,132 | 9,766 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Headroom 在 LLM 调用前压缩工具输出、日志、RAG chunk,声称节省 60-95% token。提供库、proxy、MCP server 三种接入方式。
items.backend_focus: 若你的 Agent 服务 token 成本高,可在 LLM Gateway 层加 Headroom proxy。重点验证压缩后回答质量不降,先灰度 10% 流量对比。

items.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.original_summary: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary | 语言: Python | Stars: 43,971 | Forks: 3,617 | 7,226 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: last30days-skill 让 AI Agent 自动检索 Reddit/X/YouTube/HN/Polymarket 并汇总。本质是搜索+总结的 skill 模板,4 万星增长靠营销。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质。skill 配置文件演示,自己用 SerpAPI+Tavily+LLM 一小时可复现。除非想直接抄 prompt 模板,否则无需引入。

items.title: music-assistant/server
items.original_summary: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike. | 语言: Python | Stars: 2,676 | Forks: 456 | 865 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Music Assistant 媒体库管理服务端,聚合各流媒体平台,常驻运行在 NAS/RPi/NUC。自托管音乐服务的老牌方案。
items.backend_focus: 若做智能家居或家庭音频中台,可参考其多 provider 适配架构(每个流媒体一个 provider 模块)。本周增长平缓,无重大更新。

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.original_summary: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. | 语言: JavaScript | Stars: 43,106 | Forks: 7,140 | 1,220 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: 泄露的各大模型 system prompt 合集,含 Claude/GPT/Gemini/Grok/Cursor/Copilot 等。安全研究价值高,但内容可能不准确或过时。
items.backend_focus: 可用于了解模型行为边界和 prompt 工程反向参考。注意:泄露内容未必是当前版本,生产 prompt 设计勿直接照抄,需实测验证。
